title: St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala
tagline: St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala — heritage city of Tripura

heroImage.alt: St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala, Tripura

overview.short: St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala is a much-loved heritage city in Tripura, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: The St. Francis Xavier Cathedral also called Agartala Cathedral Is a Church that serves as the episcopal seat of the diocese of Agartala which is located in the city of Agartala in the state of Tripura in the north part of the Asian country of India. Initiated in October 2010, with a plan that consisted of a planned construction for three years, which was completed two years later, in September of the year 2015, partly due to the special characteristics to resist earthquakes which involved additional work in the construction of the foundations. topPlaces.name: Diocese of Agartala
topPlaces.description: The Diocese of Agartala (Latin: Dioecesis Agartalana) is a Latin Catholic diocese comprising the entire State of Tripura in the ecclesiastical province of Shillong in India. The cathedral is St.

topPlaces.name: Tripura Industrial Development Corporation
topPlaces.description: Tripura Industrial Development Corporation or TIDC is a state governmental Industrial Development Corporation in the state of Tripura, India. It is responsible for the development and maintenance of industries in the state.

topPlaces.name: Pushbanta Palace
topPlaces.description: The Pushpabanta Palace also known as Kunjaban Palace is one of former royal palace of Tripura, it was built by Maharaja Birendra Kishore Manikya in 1917. It was the Raj Bhavan of Tripura till 2018, which later shifted to another place.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Agartala
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: Government House) is the official residence of the governor of Tripura. The residence is located in the state's capital city of Agartala.

topPlaces.name: Centre for Forest Based Livelihood and Extension
topPlaces.description: Centre for Forest-based Livelihoods and Extension (CFLE) is an Advanced Research Centre situated in Agartala in Tripura. It works under the Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education (ICFRE) of the Ministry of Environment and Forests, Govt.

image.alt: Centre for Forest Based Livelihood and Extension

topPlaces.name: Indranagar
topPlaces.description: Indranagar is a census town in West Tripura district in the Indian state of Tripura. The locality is famous for the Kali temple.

topPlaces.name: 2024 attack on the Bangladesh Assistant High Commission in India
topPlaces.description: On 2 December 2024, an attack took place at the Bangladesh Assistant High Commission in Agartala, the capital of the Indian state of Tripura. The attackers were identified as members of Hindu Sangharsh Samiti, affiliated to the far-right Hindutva group Vishva Hindu Parishad.

image.alt: 2024 attack on the Bangladesh Assistant High Commission in India

topPlaces.name: Gandhigram, Tripura
topPlaces.description: Gandhigram is a town in Tripura, India. located around 10 km from city centre Agartala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharaja Bir Bikram Airport, Agartala (4 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala?
faq.a: Stays in St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Francis Xavier Cathedral, Agartala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Agartala, Tripura Industrial Development Corporation, Pushbanta Palace, Lok Bhavan, Agartala, Centre for Forest Based Livelihood and Extension.
